fields.Name: Wicket
fields.Description: Wicket membership management platform integration for syncing people, organizations, memberships, groups, connections, and contact information via JSON:API

fields.Name: people
fields.Description: People (members, contacts) with personal, professional, and membership information

fields.Name: organizations
fields.Description: Organizations including companies, chapters, and associations

fields.Name: connections
fields.Description: Relationships between people and organizations or person-to-person connections

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: person_to_organization or person_to_person

fields.Name: groups
fields.Description: Groups for organizing people into collections

fields.Name: group_members
fields.Description: Membership records linking people to groups

fields.Name: memberships
fields.Description: Membership tier definitions (e.g., Gold, Silver, Basic)

fields.Name: person_memberships
fields.Description: Individual person membership records with start/end dates and tier assignments

fields.Name: organization_memberships
fields.Description: Organizational membership records with start/end dates, tier assignments, and max seat allocations

fields.Name: touchpoints
fields.Description: Immutable interaction audit trail records (no update/delete supported)

fields.Name: people_emails
fields.Description: Email addresses associated with people

fields.Name: people_phones
fields.Description: Phone numbers associated with people

fields.Name: people_addresses
fields.Description: Physical addresses associated with people

fields.Name: org_emails
fields.Description: Email addresses associated with organizations

fields.Name: org_phones
fields.Description: Phone numbers associated with organizations

fields.Name: org_addresses
fields.Description: Physical addresses associated with organizations

fields.Name: roles
fields.Description: System and organization-scoped roles for access control

fields.Name: user_identities
fields.Description: SSO and identity provider records linked to people (OAuth, SAML, OpenID)

fields.Name: resource_tags
fields.Description: Tags for categorizing and organizing resources
